agent_summary: Customer reports: "My account is acting weird" Classified as other. Evidence cross-checked against no matching transaction in the recent history.
recommended_next_action: Pull additional transaction history from the core ledger and confirm details with the customer via the official in-app chat before any further action.
customer_reply: Thank you for reaching out. To help us investigate accurately, please share any additional details (time, reference, recipient phone) through our official in-app support channel or hotline. Our team will review the case and respond shortly.
